Alerts

  1. Risk=Medium, Confidence=High (2)

    1. https://8afe1d1ade262a052e.gradio.live (2)

      1. Content Security Policy (CSP) Header Not Set (1)
        1. GET https://8afe1d1ade262a052e.gradio.live/
          Alert tags
          • CWE-693
          • OWASP_2021_A05
          • OWASP_2017_A06
          • POLICY_QA_STD =
          • POLICY_PENTEST =
          • SYSTEMIC
          Alert description

          Content Security Policy (CSP) is an added layer of security that helps to detect and mitigate certain types of attacks, including Cross Site Scripting (XSS) and data injection attacks. These attacks are used for everything from data theft to site defacement or distribution of malware. CSP provides a set of standard HTTP headers that allow website owners to declare approved sources of content that browsers should be allowed to load on that page — covered types are JavaScript, CSS, HTML frames, fonts, images and embeddable objects such as Java applets, ActiveX, audio and video files.
          Request
          Request line and header section (262 bytes)

Hello!"}],"css":"\n@import url(\u0027https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Playfair+Display:wght@600\u0026family=DM+Sans:wght@300;400;500\u0026display=swap\u0027);\n\n.gradio-container {\n    background: #F7F5F2 !important;\n    font-family: \u0027DM Sans\u0027, sans-serif !important;\n\n    max-width: 100% !important;\n    padding: 0 !important;\n    margin: 0 !important;\n}\n\nbody {\n    background: #F7F5F2 !important;\n}\n\n/* Contenedor principal */\n.app.svelte-182fdeq {\n    padding: 0 !important;\n}\n\n/* Chat gigante */\n.chatbot {\n    height: 520px !important;\n    font-size: 1rem !important;\n}\n\n/* Área completa */\n.main {\n    max-width: 1400px !important;\n    margin: auto !important;\n    padding: 0 24px !important;\n}\n\n/* Input más bonito */\ntextarea {\n    min-height: 60px !important;\n    font-size: 1rem !important;\n}\n\n/* Botón */\nbutton.primary {\n    height: 60px !important;\n    font-size: 1rem !important;\n    padding: 0 24px !important;\n}\n\n/* Encabezado personalizado */\n.cc-header {\n    text-align: center;\n    padding: 28px 0 8px 0;\n    border-bottom: 1px solid #e2ddd7;\n    margin-bottom: 8px;\n}\n.cc-header .brand {\n    font-family: \u0027Playfair Display\u0027, serif;\n    font-size: 1.9rem;\n    color: #1A3C6E;\n    letter-spacing: -0.5px;\n    display: block;\n}\n.cc-header .tagline {\n    font-family: \u0027DM Sans\u0027, sans-serif;\n    font-size: 0.75rem;\n    font-weight: 500;\n    color: #F4823A;\n    letter-spacing: 3px;\n    text-transform: uppercase;\n    display: block;\n    margin-top: 4px;\n}\n\n/* Burbuja usuario — texto invisible por tema oscuro */\n.message.user,\n.message.user *,\ndiv[data-testid=\"user\"] .prose,\ndiv[data-testid=\"user\"] .prose p {\n    background: #1A3C6E !important;\n    color: #FFFFFF !important;\n}\n\n/* Burbuja bot */\n.message.bot {\n    background: #FFFFFF !important;\n    color: #1a1a1a !important;\n    border: 1px solid #e8e2da !important;\n    border-radius: 16px 16px 16px 2px !important;\n    font-family: \u0027DM Sans\u0027, sans-serif !important;\n    font-size: 0.93rem !important;\n    line-height: 1.6 !important;\n}\n\n/* Área del chat */\n.chatbot {\n    background: #F7F5F2 !important;\n    border: 1px solid #e2ddd7 !important;\n    border-radius: 12px !important;\n}\n\n/* Botón enviar */\nbutton.primary {\n    background: #F4823A !important;\n    border: none !important;\n    color: white !important;\n    font-family: \u0027DM Sans\u0027, sans-serif !important;\n    font-weight: 500 !important;\n    border-radius: 8px !important;\n    letter-spacing: 0.3px !important;\n    transition: background 0.2s ease !important;\n}\nbutton.primary:hover {\n    background: #d9672a !important;\n}\n\n/* Ejemplos */\n.examples-table td {\n    background: #FFFFFF !important;\n    color: #1A3C6E !important;\n    border: 1px solid #e2ddd7 !important;\n    border-radius: 8px !important;\n    font-family: \u0027DM Sans\u0027, sans-serif !important;\n    font-size: 0.85rem !important;\n    font-weight: 400 !important;\n    transition: all 0.2s ease !important;\n}\n.examples-table td:hover {\n    background: #1A3C6E !important;\n    color: #fff !important;\n    border-color: #1A3C6E !important;\n}\n\n/* Input — texto invisible contra fondo oscuro */\ntextarea,\ntextarea:focus,\n.gradio-container textarea,\ninput[type=\"text\"] {\n    color: #1a1a1a !important;\n    background: #FFFFFF !important;\n    border: 1.5px solid #d6d0c8 !important;\n    border-radius: 8px !important;\n    caret-color: #1A3C6E !important;\n}\n/* Descripción */\n.prose p, .prose strong {\n    font-family: \u0027DM Sans\u0027, sans-serif !important;\n    color: #3a3530 !important;\n}\n\n/* Footer */\n.cc-footer {\n    text-align: center;\n    margin-top: 20px;\n    padding: 16px 0;\n    border-top: 1px solid #e2ddd7;\n    font-family: \u0027DM Sans\u0027, sans-serif;\n    font-size: 0.8rem;\n    color: #8a8078;\n}\n.cc-footer a {\n    color: #1A3C6E;\n    text-decoration: none;\n    font-weight: 500;\n}\n.cc-footer a:hover {\n    color: #F4823A;\n}\n.cc-footer .divider {\n    margin: 0 10px;\n    color: #d6d0c8;\n}\n","connect_heartbeat":true,"js":"","head":"","title":"Latino America Comparte – virtual de Latinoamérica Comparte** — organización social con más de 10 años transformando vidas a través del emprendimiento, el liderazgo y el bienestar empresarial.\n\nMás de **1.200 personas**, **70 empresas** y **65 mentores** han sido parte de este proceso.\n\nConsulta sobre nuestras líneas **Comparte Academia** (programas DESKUBRE y ESTRUCTURA), **Comparte Liderazgo** y **Comparte Talento**, o escríbenos directamente.","show_label":false,"rtl":false,"latex_delimiters":[{"left":"$$","right":"$$","display":true}],"visible":true,"elem_classes":[],"preserved_by_key":["value"],"sanitize_html":true,"line_breaks":false,"header_links":false,"show_copy_button":false,"container":false,"padding":false,"name":"markdown","_selectable":false},"skip_api":false,"component_class_id":"543eb5f8dcfca947ba66ab196db059c79cdca82621b183bfcd8bbe4afebcd005","key":null,"api_info":{"type":"string"},"api_info_as_input":{"type":"string"},"api_info_as_output":{"type":"string"},"example_inputs":"# target=\"_blank\"\u003elatinoamericacomparte.com\u003c/a\u003e\n  \u003cspan class=\"divider\"\u003e·\u003c/span\u003e\n  \u003ca href=\"https://www.youtube.com/@latinoamericacomparte\" target=\"_blank\"\u003eYouTube\u003c/a\u003e\n  \u003cbr\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\n  \u003cspan\u003eEste chatbot responde únicamente con información Hello!"}],"css":"\n@import url(\u0027https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Playfair+Display:wght@600\u0026family=DM+Sans:wght@300;400;500\u0026display=swap\u0027);\n\n.gradio-container {\n    background: #F7F5F2 !important;\n    font-family: \u0027DM Sans\u0027, sans-serif !important;\n\n    max-width: 100% !important;\n    padding: 0 !important;\n    margin: 0 !important;\n}\n\nbody {\n    background: #F7F5F2 !important;\n}\n\n/* Contenedor principal */\n.app.svelte-182fdeq {\n    padding: 0 !important;\n}\n\n/* Chat gigante */\n.chatbot {\n    height: 520px !important;\n    font-size: 1rem !important;\n}\n\n/* Área completa */\n.main {\n    max-width: 1400px !important;\n    margin: auto !important;\n    padding: 0 24px !important;\n}\n\n/* Input más bonito */\ntextarea {\n    min-height: 60px !important;\n    font-size: 1rem !important;\n}\n\n/* Botón */\nbutton.primary {\n    height: 60px !important;\n    font-size: 1rem !important;\n    padding: 0 24px !important;\n}\n\n/* Encabezado personalizado */\n.cc-header {\n    text-align: center;\n    padding: 28px 0 8px 0;\n    border-bottom: 1px solid #e2ddd7;\n    margin-bottom: 8px;\n}\n.cc-header .brand {\n    font-family: \u0027Playfair Display\u0027, serif;\n    font-size: 1.9rem;\n    color: #1A3C6E;\n    letter-spacing: -0.5px;\n    display: block;\n}\n.cc-header .tagline {\n    font-family: \u0027DM Sans\u0027, sans-serif;\n    font-size: 0.75rem;\n    font-weight: 500;\n    color: #F4823A;\n    letter-spacing: 3px;\n    text-transform: uppercase;\n    display: block;\n    margin-top: 4px;\n}\n\n/* Burbuja usuario — texto invisible por tema oscuro */\n.message.user,\n.message.user *,\ndiv[data-testid=\"user\"] .prose,\ndiv[data-testid=\"user\"] .prose p {\n    background: #1A3C6E !important;\n    color: #FFFFFF !important;\n}\n\n/* Burbuja bot */\n.message.bot {\n    background: #FFFFFF !important;\n    color: #1a1a1a !important;\n    border: 1px solid #e8e2da !important;\n    border-radius: 16px 16px 16px 2px !important;\n    font-family: \u0027DM Sans\u0027, sans-serif !important;\n    font-size: 0.93rem !important;\n    line-height: 1.6 !important;\n}\n\n/* Área del chat */\n.chatbot {\n    background: #F7F5F2 !important;\n    border: 1px solid #e2ddd7 !important;\n    border-radius: 12px !important;\n}\n\n/* Botón enviar */\nbutton.primary {\n    background: #F4823A !important;\n    border: none !important;\n    color: white !important;\n    font-family: \u0027DM Sans\u0027, sans-serif !important;\n    font-weight: 500 !important;\n    border-radius: 8px !important;\n    letter-spacing: 0.3px !important;\n    transition: background 0.2s ease !important;\n}\nbutton.primary:hover {\n    background: #d9672a !important;\n}\n\n/* Ejemplos */\n.examples-table td {\n    background: #FFFFFF !important;\n    color: #1A3C6E !important;\n    border: 1px solid #e2ddd7 !important;\n    border-radius: 8px !important;\n    font-family: \u0027DM Sans\u0027, sans-serif !important;\n    font-size: 0.85rem !important;\n    font-weight: 400 !important;\n    transition: all 0.2s ease !important;\n}\n.examples-table td:hover {\n    background: #1A3C6E !important;\n    color: #fff !important;\n    border-color: #1A3C6E !important;\n}\n\n/* Input — texto invisible contra fondo oscuro */\ntextarea,\ntextarea:focus,\n.gradio-container textarea,\ninput[type=\"text\"] {\n    color: #1a1a1a !important;\n    background: #FFFFFF !important;\n    border: 1.5px solid #d6d0c8 !important;\n    border-radius: 8px !important;\n    caret-color: #1A3C6E !important;\n}\n/* Descripción */\n.prose p, .prose strong {\n    font-family: \u0027DM Sans\u0027, sans-serif !important;\n    color: #3a3530 !important;\n}\n\n/* Footer */\n.cc-footer {\n    text-align: center;\n    margin-top: 20px;\n    padding: 16px 0;\n    border-top: 1px solid #e2ddd7;\n    font-family: \u0027DM Sans\u0027, sans-serif;\n    font-size: 0.8rem;\n    color: #8a8078;\n}\n.cc-footer a {\n    color: #1A3C6E;\n    text-decoration: none;\n    font-weight: 500;\n}\n.cc-footer a:hover {\n    color: #F4823A;\n}\n.cc-footer .divider {\n    margin: 0 10px;\n    color: #d6d0c8;\n}\n","connect_heartbeat":true,"js":"","head":"","title":"Latino America Comparte – Chatbot","space_id":null,"enable_queue":true,"show_error":false,"show_api":true,"is_colab":true,"max_file_size":null,"stylesheets":["https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Poppins:wght@400;600\u0026display=swap"],"theme":"soft","protocol":"sse_v3","body_css":{"body_background_fill":"linear-gradient(135deg, 		<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com" />
		<link
			rel="preconnect"
			href="https://fonts.gstatic.com"
			crossorigin="anonymous"
		/>
		<script
			src="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/iframe-resizer/4.3.1/iframeResizer.contentWindow.min.js"
			async
		></script>
		<script data-gradio-mode>
			window.__gradio_mode__ = "app";
			window.iFrameResizer = {
				autoResize: false,
				sizeWidth: false
			};
			window.parent?.postMessage(
				{ type: "SET_SCROLLING", enabled: false },
				"*"
			);
		</script>
		<link rel="manifest" href="/manifest.json" />
		<script type="module" crossorigin src="./assets/index-DputZZxm.js"></script>
		<link rel="stylesheet" crossorigin href="./assets/index-CCA5X64I.css">
	</head>

	<body
		style="
			width: 100%;
			margin: 0;
			padding: 0;
			display: flex;
			flex-direction: column;
			flex-grow: 1;
		"
	>
		<gradio-app
			control_page_title="true"
			embed="false"
			eager="true"
			style="display: flex; flex-direction: column; flex-grow: 1"
		>
		</gradio-app>
		<script>
			const ce = document.getElementsByTagName("gradio-app");

			if (ce[0]) {
				ce[0].addEventListener("domchange", () => {
					document.body.style.padding = "0";
				});
				document.body.style.padding = "0";
			}
		</script>
	</body>

          Solution

          Provide a valid integrity attribute to the tag.

  2. Risk=Medium, Confidence=Medium (2)

    1. https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com (1)

      1. Cross-Domain Misconfiguration (1)
        1. GET https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/iframe-resizer/4.3.1/iframeResizer.contentWindow.min.js
          Alert tags
          • OWASP_2021_A01
          • OWASP_2017_A05
          • CWE-264
          • POLICY_QA_STD =
          • POLICY_PENTEST =
          • SYSTEMIC
          Alert description

          Web browser data loading may be possible, due to a Cross Origin Resource Sharing (CORS) misconfiguration on the web server.
          Other info

          The CORS misconfiguration on the web server permits cross-domain read requests from arbitrary third party domains, using unauthenticated APIs on this domain. Web browser implementations do not permit arbitrary third parties to read the response from authenticated APIs, however. This reduces the risk somewhat. This misconfiguration could be used by an attacker to access data that is available in an unauthenticated manner, but which uses some other form of security, such as IP address white-listing.

//# sourceMappingURL=iframeResizer.contentWindow.map
          Evidence 
          Access-Control-Allow-Origin: *
          Solution

          Ensure that sensitive data is not available in an unauthenticated manner (using IP address white-listing, for instance).

          Configure the "Access-Control-Allow-Origin" HTTP header to a more restrictive set of domains, or remove all CORS headers entirely, to allow the web browser to enforce the Same Origin Policy (SOP) in a more restrictive manner.

    2. https://8afe1d1ade262a052e.gradio.live (1)

      1. Missing Anti-clickjacking Header (1)
        1. GET https://8afe1d1ade262a052e.gradio.live/
          Alert tags
          • OWASP_2021_A05
          • POLICY_QA_STD =
          • POLICY_PENTEST =
          • CWE-1021
          • SYSTEMIC
          • WSTG-v42-CLNT-09
          • OWASP_2017_A06
          Alert description

          The response does not protect against 'ClickJacking' attacks. It should include either Content-Security-Policy with 'frame-ancestors' directive or X-Frame-Options.
          Request
          Request line and header section (262 bytes) 
          GET https://8afe1d1ade262a052e.gradio.live/ HTTP/1.1

user-agent: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/141.0.0.0 Safari/537.36
pragma: no-cache
cache-control: no-cache

Connection: keep-alive

			:root {
				--bg: linear-gradient(135deg, #f0f4f8 0%, #fdf6f0 100%);
				--col:   #1e293b;
				--bg-dark: #0a0f1e;
				--col-dark: #f1f5f9;
			}


			body {
				background: var(--bg);
				color: var(--col);
				font-family: Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif;
			}

			@media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) {
				body {
					background: var(--bg-dark);
					color: var(--col-dark);
				}
			}
		</style>

virtual de Latinoamérica Comparte** — organización social con más de 10 años transformando vidas a través del emprendimiento, el liderazgo y el bienestar empresarial.\n\nMás de **1.200 personas**, **70 empresas** y **65 mentores** han sido parte de este proceso.\n\nConsulta sobre nuestras líneas **Comparte Academia** (programas DESKUBRE y ESTRUCTURA), **Comparte Liderazgo** y **Comparte Talento**, o escríbenos background: #F7F5F2 !important;\n    font-family: \u0027DM Sans\u0027, sans-serif !important;\n\n    max-width: 100% !important;\n    padding: 0 !important;\n    margin: 0 !important;\n}\n\nbody {\n    background: #F7F5F2 !important;\n}\n\n/* Contenedor principal */\n.app.svelte-182fdeq {\n    padding: 0 !important;\n}\n\n/* Chat gigante */\n.chatbot {\n    height: 520px !important;\n    font-size: 1rem !important;\n}\n\n/* Área completa */\n.main {\n    max-width: 1400px !important;\n    margin: auto !important;\n    padding: 0 24px !important;\n}\n\n/* Input más bonito */\ntextarea {\n    min-height: 60px !important;\n    font-size: 1rem !important;\n}\n\n/* Botón */\nbutton.primary {\n    height: 60px !important;\n    font-size: 1rem !important;\n    padding: 0 24px !important;\n}\n\n/* Encabezado personalizado */\n.cc-header {\n    text-align: center;\n    padding: 28px 0 8px 0;\n    border-bottom: 1px solid #e2ddd7;\n    margin-bottom: 8px;\n}\n.cc-header .brand {\n    font-family: \u0027Playfair Display\u0027, serif;\n    font-size: 1.9rem;\n    color: #1A3C6E;\n    letter-spacing: -0.5px;\n    display: block;\n}\n.cc-header .tagline {\n    font-family: \u0027DM Sans\u0027, sans-serif;\n    font-size: 0.75rem;\n    font-weight: 500;\n    color: #F4823A;\n    letter-spacing: 3px;\n    text-transform: uppercase;\n    display: block;\n    margin-top: 4px;\n}\n\n/* Burbuja usuario — texto invisible por tema oscuro */\n.message.user,\n.message.user *,\ndiv[data-testid=\"user\"] .prose,\ndiv[data-testid=\"user\"] .prose p {\n    background: #1A3C6E !important;\n    color: #FFFFFF !important;\n}\n\n/* Burbuja bot */\n.message.bot {\n    background: #FFFFFF !important;\n    color: #1a1a1a !important;\n    border: 1px solid #e8e2da !important;\n    border-radius: 16px 16px 16px 2px !important;\n    font-family: \u0027DM Sans\u0027, sans-serif !important;\n    font-size: 0.93rem !important;\n    line-height: 1.6 !important;\n}\n\n/* Área del chat */\n.chatbot {\n    background: #F7F5F2 !important;\n    border: 1px solid #e2ddd7 !important;\n    border-radius: 12px !important;\n}\n\n/* Botón enviar */\nbutton.primary {\n    background: #F4823A !important;\n    border: none !important;\n    color: white !important;\n    font-family: \u0027DM Sans\u0027, sans-serif !important;\n    font-weight: 500 !important;\n    border-radius: 8px !important;\n    letter-spacing: 0.3px !important;\n    transition: background 0.2s ease !important;\n}\nbutton.primary:hover {\n    background: #d9672a !important;\n}\n\n/* Ejemplos */\n.examples-table td {\n    background: #FFFFFF !important;\n    color: #1A3C6E !important;\n    border: 1px solid #e2ddd7 !important;\n    border-radius: 8px !important;\n    font-family: \u0027DM Sans\u0027, sans-serif !important;\n    font-size: 0.85rem !important;\n    font-weight: 400 !important;\n    transition: all 0.2s ease !important;\n}\n.examples-table td:hover {\n    background: #1A3C6E !important;\n    color: #fff !important;\n    border-color: #1A3C6E !important;\n}\n\n/* Input — texto invisible contra fondo oscuro */\ntextarea,\ntextarea:focus,\n.gradio-container textarea,\ninput[type=\"text\"] {\n    color: #1a1a1a !important;\n    background: #FFFFFF !important;\n    border: 1.5px solid #d6d0c8 !important;\n    border-radius: 8px !important;\n    caret-color: #1A3C6E !important;\n}\n/* Descripción */\n.prose p, .prose strong {\n    font-family: \u0027DM Sans\u0027, sans-serif !important;\n    color: #3a3530 !important;\n}\n\n/* Footer */\n.cc-footer {\n    text-align: center;\n    margin-top: 20px;\n    padding: 16px 0;\n    border-top: 1px solid #e2ddd7;\n    font-family: \u0027DM Sans\u0027, sans-serif;\n    font-size: 0.8rem;\n    color: #8a8078;\n}\n.cc-footer a {\n    color: #1A3C6E;\n    text-decoration: none;\n    font-weight: 500;\n}\n.cc-footer a:hover {\n    color: #F4823A;\n}\n.cc-footer .divider {\n    margin: 0 10px;\n    color: #d6d0c8;\n}\n","connect_heartbeat":true,"js":"","head":"","title":"Latino America Comparte – 			control_page_title="true"
			embed="false"
			eager="true"
			style="display: flex; flex-direction: column; flex-grow: 1"
		>

		<script>
			const ce = document.getElementsByTagName("gradio-app");

			if (ce[0]) {
				ce[0].addEventListener("domchange", () => {
					document.body.style.padding = "0";
				});
				document.body.style.padding = "0";
			}
		</script>

          Parameter 
          x-frame-options
          Solution

          Modern Web browsers support the Content-Security-Policy and X-Frame-Options HTTP headers. Ensure one of them is set on all web pages returned by your site/app.

          If you expect the page to be framed only by pages on your server (e.g. it's part of a FRAMESET) then you'll want to use SAMEORIGIN, otherwise if you never expect the page to be framed, you should use DENY. Alternatively consider implementing Content Security Policy's "frame-ancestors" directive.

  3. Risk=Low, Confidence=High (1)

    1. https://8afe1d1ade262a052e.gradio.live (1)

      1. Strict-Transport-Security Header Not Set (1)
        1. GET https://8afe1d1ade262a052e.gradio.live/assets/index-DputZZxm.js
          Alert tags
          • OWASP_2021_A05
          • OWASP_2017_A06
          • POLICY_QA_STD =
          • POLICY_PENTEST =
          • SYSTEMIC
          • CWE-319
          Alert description

          HTTP Strict Transport Security (HSTS) is a web security policy mechanism whereby a web server declares that complying user agents (such as a web browser) are to interact with it using only secure HTTPS connections (i.e. HTTP layered over TLS/SSL). HSTS is an IETF standards track protocol and is specified in RFC 6797.

		<style>
			:root {
				--bg: linear-gradient(135deg, #f0f4f8 0%, #fdf6f0 100%);
				--col:   #1e293b;
				--bg-dark: #0a0f1e;
				--col-dark: #f1f5f9;
			}


			body {
				background: var(--bg);
				color: var(--col);
				font-family: Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif;
			}

			@media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) {
				body {
					background: var(--bg-dark);
					color: var(--col-dark);
				}
			}

virtual de Latinoamérica Comparte** — organización social con más de 10 años transformando vidas a través del emprendimiento, el liderazgo y el bienestar empresarial.\n\nMás de **1.200 personas**, **70 empresas** y **65 mentores** han sido parte de este proceso.\n\nConsulta sobre nuestras líneas **Comparte Academia** (programas DESKUBRE y ESTRUCTURA), **Comparte Liderazgo** y **Comparte Talento**, o escríbenos Hello!"}],"css":"\n@import url(\u0027https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Playfair+Display:wght@600\u0026family=DM+Sans:wght@300;400;500\u0026display=swap\u0027);\n\n.gradio-container {\n    background: #F7F5F2 !important;\n    font-family: \u0027DM Sans\u0027, sans-serif !important;\n\n    max-width: 100% !important;\n    padding: 0 !important;\n    margin: 0 !important;\n}\n\nbody {\n    background: #F7F5F2 !important;\n}\n\n/* Contenedor principal */\n.app.svelte-182fdeq {\n    padding: 0 !important;\n}\n\n/* Chat gigante */\n.chatbot {\n    height: 520px !important;\n    font-size: 1rem !important;\n}\n\n/* Área completa */\n.main {\n    max-width: 1400px !important;\n    margin: auto !important;\n    padding: 0 24px !important;\n}\n\n/* Input más bonito */\ntextarea {\n    min-height: 60px !important;\n    font-size: 1rem !important;\n}\n\n/* Botón */\nbutton.primary {\n    height: 60px !important;\n    font-size: 1rem !important;\n    padding: 0 24px !important;\n}\n\n/* Encabezado personalizado */\n.cc-header {\n    text-align: center;\n    padding: 28px 0 8px 0;\n    border-bottom: 1px solid #e2ddd7;\n    margin-bottom: 8px;\n}\n.cc-header .brand {\n    font-family: \u0027Playfair Display\u0027, serif;\n    font-size: 1.9rem;\n    color: #1A3C6E;\n    letter-spacing: -0.5px;\n    display: block;\n}\n.cc-header .tagline {\n    font-family: \u0027DM Sans\u0027, sans-serif;\n    font-size: 0.75rem;\n    font-weight: 500;\n    color: #F4823A;\n    letter-spacing: 3px;\n    text-transform: uppercase;\n    display: block;\n    margin-top: 4px;\n}\n\n/* Burbuja usuario — texto invisible por tema oscuro */\n.message.user,\n.message.user *,\ndiv[data-testid=\"user\"] .prose,\ndiv[data-testid=\"user\"] .prose p {\n    background: #1A3C6E !important;\n    color: #FFFFFF !important;\n}\n\n/* Burbuja bot */\n.message.bot {\n    background: #FFFFFF !important;\n    color: #1a1a1a !important;\n    border: 1px solid #e8e2da !important;\n    border-radius: 16px 16px 16px 2px !important;\n    font-family: \u0027DM Sans\u0027, sans-serif !important;\n    font-size: 0.93rem !important;\n    line-height: 1.6 !important;\n}\n\n/* Área del chat */\n.chatbot {\n    background: #F7F5F2 !important;\n    border: 1px solid #e2ddd7 !important;\n    border-radius: 12px !important;\n}\n\n/* Botón enviar */\nbutton.primary {\n    background: #F4823A !important;\n    border: none !important;\n    color: white !important;\n    font-family: \u0027DM Sans\u0027, sans-serif !important;\n    font-weight: 500 !important;\n    border-radius: 8px !important;\n    letter-spacing: 0.3px !important;\n    transition: background 0.2s ease !important;\n}\nbutton.primary:hover {\n    background: #d9672a !important;\n}\n\n/* Ejemplos */\n.examples-table td {\n    background: #FFFFFF !important;\n    color: #1A3C6E !important;\n    border: 1px solid #e2ddd7 !important;\n    border-radius: 8px !important;\n    font-family: \u0027DM Sans\u0027, sans-serif !important;\n    font-size: 0.85rem !important;\n    font-weight: 400 !important;\n    transition: all 0.2s ease !important;\n}\n.examples-table td:hover {\n    background: #1A3C6E !important;\n    color: #fff !important;\n    border-color: #1A3C6E !important;\n}\n\n/* Input — texto invisible contra fondo oscuro */\ntextarea,\ntextarea:focus,\n.gradio-container textarea,\ninput[type=\"text\"] {\n    color: #1a1a1a !important;\n    background: #FFFFFF !important;\n    border: 1.5px solid #d6d0c8 !important;\n    border-radius: 8px !important;\n    caret-color: #1A3C6E !important;\n}\n/* Descripción */\n.prose p, .prose strong {\n    font-family: \u0027DM Sans\u0027, sans-serif !important;\n    color: #3a3530 !important;\n}\n\n/* Footer */\n.cc-footer {\n    text-align: center;\n    margin-top: 20px;\n    padding: 16px 0;\n    border-top: 1px solid #e2ddd7;\n    font-family: \u0027DM Sans\u0027, sans-serif;\n    font-size: 0.8rem;\n    color: #8a8078;\n}\n.cc-footer a {\n    color: #1A3C6E;\n    text-decoration: none;\n    font-weight: 500;\n}\n.cc-footer a:hover {\n    color: #F4823A;\n}\n.cc-footer .divider {\n    margin: 0 10px;\n    color: #d6d0c8;\n}\n","connect_heartbeat":true,"js":"","head":"","title":"Latino America Comparte –           Solution

          Ensure JavaScript source files are loaded from only trusted sources, and the sources can't be controlled by end users of the application.
      2. X-Content-Type-Options Header Missing (1)
        1. GET https://8afe1d1ade262a052e.gradio.live/assets/index-DputZZxm.js
          Alert tags
          • CWE-693
          • OWASP_2021_A05
          • OWASP_2017_A06
          • POLICY_QA_STD =
          • POLICY_PENTEST =
          • SYSTEMIC
          Alert description

          The Anti-MIME-Sniffing header X-Content-Type-Options was not set to 'nosniff'. This allows older versions of Internet Explorer and Chrome to perform MIME-sniffing on the response body, potentially causing the response body to be interpreted and displayed as a content type other than the declared content type. Current (early 2014) and legacy versions of Firefox will use the declared content type (if one is set), rather than performing MIME-sniffing.
          Other info

          This issue still applies to error type pages (401, 403, 500, etc.) as those pages are often still affected by injection issues, in which case there is still concern for browsers sniffing pages away from their actual content type.

          At "High" threshold this scan rule will not alert on client or server error responses.

          Parameter 
          x-content-type-options
          Solution

          Ensure that the application/web server sets the Content-Type header appropriately, and that it sets the X-Content-Type-Options header to 'nosniff' for all web pages.

          If possible, ensure that the end user uses a standards-compliant and modern web browser that does not perform MIME-sniffing at all, or that can be directed by the web application/web server to not perform MIME-sniffing.

  5. Risk=Low, Confidence=Low (1)

          Evidence 
          1744830465
          Solution

          Manually confirm that the timestamp data is not sensitive, and that the data cannot be aggregated to disclose exploitable patterns.

  6. Risk=Informational, Confidence=Medium (12)

    1. https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com (4)

      1. Retrieved from Cache (1)
        1. GET https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/iframe-resizer/4.3.1/iframeResizer.contentWindow.min.js
          Alert tags
          • WSTG-v42-ATHN-06
          • CWE-525
          • POLICY_PENTEST =
          • SYSTEMIC
          Alert description

          The content was retrieved from a shared cache. If the response data is sensitive, personal or user-specific, this may result in sensitive information being leaked. In some cases, this may even result in a user gaining complete control of the session of another user, depending on the configuration of the caching components in use in their environment. This is primarily an issue where caching servers such as "proxy" caches are configured on the local network. This configuration is typically found in corporate or educational environments, for instance.
          Other info

          The presence of the 'Age' header indicates that a HTTP/1.1 compliant caching server is in use.

          Evidence 
          Age: 86261
          Solution

          Validate that the response does not contain sensitive, personal or user-specific information. If it does, consider the use of the following HTTP response headers, to limit, or prevent the content being stored and retrieved from the cache by another user:

          Cache-Control: no-cache, no-store, must-revalidate, private

          Pragma: no-cache

          Expires: 0

          This configuration directs both HTTP 1.0 and HTTP 1.1 compliant caching servers to not store the response, and to not retrieve the response (without validation) from the cache, in response to a similar request.
      2. Tech Detected - Cloudflare (1)
        1. GET https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/iframe-resizer/4.3.1/iframeResizer.contentWindow.min.js
          Alert tags
          Alert description

          The following "CDN" technology was identified: Cloudflare.

          Described as:

          Cloudflare is a web-infrastructure and website-security company, providing content-delivery-network services, DDoS mitigation, Internet security, and distributed domain-name-server services.
          Other info

          The following CPE is associated with the identified tech: cpe:2.3:a:cloudflare:cloudflare:*:*:*:*:*:*:*:*

          Request line and header section (420 bytes) 
          GET https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/iframe-resizer/4.3.1/iframeResizer.contentWindow.min.js HTTP/1.1

		margin: 0;

		flex-direction: column;

>
	<head>
		<meta charset="utf-8" />
		<meta
			name="viewport"
			content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1, shrink-to-fit=no"
		/>
		<meta property="og:title" content="Gradio" />
		<meta property="og:type" content="website" />
		<meta property="og:url" content="{url}" />
		<meta property="og:description" content="Click to try out the app!" />

			property="og:image"
			content="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/gradio-app/gradio/main/js/_website/src/lib/assets/img/header-image.jpg"

		/>

		<style>
			:root {
				--bg: linear-gradient(135deg, #f0f4f8 0%, #fdf6f0 100%);
				--col:   #1e293b;
				--bg-dark: #0a0f1e;
				--col-dark: #f1f5f9;
			}


			body {
				background: var(--bg);
				color: var(--col);
				font-family: Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif;
			}

			@media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) {
				body {
					background: var(--bg-dark);
					color: var(--col-dark);
				}
			}
		</style>

		<meta property="og:url" content="https://gradio.app/" />

virtual de Latinoamérica Comparte** — organización social con más de 10 años transformando vidas a través del emprendimiento, el liderazgo y el bienestar empresarial.\n\nMás de **1.200 personas**, **70 empresas** y **65 mentores** han sido parte de este proceso.\n\nConsulta sobre nuestras líneas **Comparte Academia** (programas DESKUBRE y ESTRUCTURA), **Comparte Liderazgo** y **Comparte Talento**, o escríbenos target=\"_blank\"\u003elatinoamericacomparte.com\u003c/a\u003e\n  \u003cspan class=\"divider\"\u003e·\u003c/span\u003e\n  \u003ca href=\"https://www.youtube.com/@latinoamericacomparte\" target=\"_blank\"\u003eYouTube\u003c/a\u003e\n  \u003cbr\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\n  \u003cspan\u003eEste chatbot responde únicamente con información Hello!"}],"css":"\n@import url(\u0027https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Playfair+Display:wght@600\u0026family=DM+Sans:wght@300;400;500\u0026display=swap\u0027);\n\n.gradio-container {\n    background: #F7F5F2 !important;\n    font-family: \u0027DM Sans\u0027, sans-serif !important;\n\n    max-width: 100% !important;\n    padding: 0 !important;\n    margin: 0 !important;\n}\n\nbody {\n    background: #F7F5F2 !important;\n}\n\n/* Contenedor principal */\n.app.svelte-182fdeq {\n    padding: 0 !important;\n}\n\n/* Chat gigante */\n.chatbot {\n    height: 520px !important;\n    font-size: 1rem !important;\n}\n\n/* Área completa */\n.main {\n    max-width: 1400px !important;\n    margin: auto !important;\n    padding: 0 24px !important;\n}\n\n/* Input más bonito */\ntextarea {\n    min-height: 60px !important;\n    font-size: 1rem !important;\n}\n\n/* Botón */\nbutton.primary {\n    height: 60px !important;\n    font-size: 1rem !important;\n    padding: 0 24px !important;\n}\n\n/* Encabezado personalizado */\n.cc-header {\n    text-align: center;\n    padding: 28px 0 8px 0;\n    border-bottom: 1px solid #e2ddd7;\n    margin-bottom: 8px;\n}\n.cc-header .brand {\n    font-family: \u0027Playfair Display\u0027, serif;\n    font-size: 1.9rem;\n    color: #1A3C6E;\n    letter-spacing: -0.5px;\n    display: block;\n}\n.cc-header .tagline {\n    font-family: \u0027DM Sans\u0027, sans-serif;\n    font-size: 0.75rem;\n    font-weight: 500;\n    color: #F4823A;\n    letter-spacing: 3px;\n    text-transform: uppercase;\n    display: block;\n    margin-top: 4px;\n}\n\n/* Burbuja usuario — texto invisible por tema oscuro */\n.message.user,\n.message.user *,\ndiv[data-testid=\"user\"] .prose,\ndiv[data-testid=\"user\"] .prose p {\n    background: #1A3C6E !important;\n    color: #FFFFFF !important;\n}\n\n/* Burbuja bot */\n.message.bot {\n    background: #FFFFFF !important;\n    color: #1a1a1a !important;\n    border: 1px solid #e8e2da !important;\n    border-radius: 16px 16px 16px 2px !important;\n    font-family: \u0027DM Sans\u0027, sans-serif !important;\n    font-size: 0.93rem !important;\n    line-height: 1.6 !important;\n}\n\n/* Área del chat */\n.chatbot {\n    background: #F7F5F2 !important;\n    border: 1px solid #e2ddd7 !important;\n    border-radius: 12px !important;\n}\n\n/* Botón enviar */\nbutton.primary {\n    background: #F4823A !important;\n    border: none !important;\n    color: white !important;\n    font-family: \u0027DM Sans\u0027, sans-serif !important;\n    font-weight: 500 !important;\n    border-radius: 8px !important;\n    letter-spacing: 0.3px !important;\n    transition: background 0.2s ease !important;\n}\nbutton.primary:hover {\n    background: #d9672a !important;\n}\n\n/* Ejemplos */\n.examples-table td {\n    background: #FFFFFF !important;\n    color: #1A3C6E !important;\n    border: 1px solid #e2ddd7 !important;\n    border-radius: 8px !important;\n    font-family: \u0027DM Sans\u0027, sans-serif !important;\n    font-size: 0.85rem !important;\n    font-weight: 400 !important;\n    transition: all 0.2s ease !important;\n}\n.examples-table td:hover {\n    background: #1A3C6E !important;\n    color: #fff !important;\n    border-color: #1A3C6E !important;\n}\n\n/* Input — texto invisible contra fondo oscuro */\ntextarea,\ntextarea:focus,\n.gradio-container textarea,\ninput[type=\"text\"] {\n    color: #1a1a1a !important;\n    background: #FFFFFF !important;\n    border: 1.5px solid #d6d0c8 !important;\n    border-radius: 8px !important;\n    caret-color: #1A3C6E !important;\n}\n/* Descripción */\n.prose p, .prose strong {\n    font-family: \u0027DM Sans\u0027, sans-serif !important;\n    color: #3a3530 !important;\n}\n\n/* Footer */\n.cc-footer {\n    text-align: center;\n    margin-top: 20px;\n    padding: 16px 0;\n    border-top: 1px solid #e2ddd7;\n    font-family: \u0027DM Sans\u0027, sans-serif;\n    font-size: 0.8rem;\n    color: #8a8078;\n}\n.cc-footer a {\n    color: #1A3C6E;\n    text-decoration: none;\n    font-weight: 500;\n}\n.cc-footer a:hover {\n    color: #F4823A;\n}\n.cc-footer .divider {\n    margin: 0 10px;\n    color: #d6d0c8;\n}\n","connect_heartbeat":true,"js":"","head":"","title":"Latino America Comparte – **70 empresas** y **65 mentores** han sido parte de este proceso.\n\nConsulta sobre nuestras líneas **Comparte Academia** (programas DESKUBRE y ESTRUCTURA), **Comparte Liderazgo** y **Comparte Comparte.\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003c/div\u003e","show_label":false,"rtl":false,"latex_delimiters":[{"left":"$$","right":"$$","display":true}],"visible":true,"elem_classes":[],"preserved_by_key":["value"],"sanitize_html":true,"line_breaks":false,"header_links":false,"show_copy_button":false,"container":false,"padding":false,"name":"markdown","_selectable":false},"skip_api":false,"component_class_id":"543eb5f8dcfca947ba66ab196db059c79cdca82621b183bfcd8bbe4afebcd005","key":null,"api_info":{"type":"string"},"api_info_as_input":{"type":"string"},"api_info_as_output":{"type":"string"},"example_inputs":"# Hello!"}],"css":"\n@import url(\u0027https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Playfair+Display:wght@600\u0026family=DM+Sans:wght@300;400;500\u0026display=swap\u0027);\n\n.gradio-container {\n    background: #F7F5F2 !important;\n    font-family: \u0027DM Sans\u0027, sans-serif !important;\n\n    max-width: 100% !important;\n    padding: 0 !important;\n    margin: 0 !important;\n}\n\nbody {\n    background: #F7F5F2 !important;\n}\n\n/* Contenedor principal */\n.app.svelte-182fdeq {\n    padding: 0 !important;\n}\n\n/* Chat gigante */\n.chatbot {\n    height: 520px !important;\n    font-size: 1rem !important;\n}\n\n/* Área completa */\n.main {\n    max-width: 1400px !important;\n    margin: auto !important;\n    padding: 0 24px !important;\n}\n\n/* Input más bonito */\ntextarea {\n    min-height: 60px !important;\n    font-size: 1rem !important;\n}\n\n/* Botón */\nbutton.primary {\n    height: 60px !important;\n    font-size: 1rem !important;\n    padding: 0 24px !important;\n}\n\n/* Encabezado personalizado */\n.cc-header {\n    text-align: center;\n    padding: 28px 0 8px 0;\n    border-bottom: 1px solid #e2ddd7;\n    margin-bottom: 8px;\n}\n.cc-header .brand {\n    font-family: \u0027Playfair Display\u0027, serif;\n    font-size: 1.9rem;\n    color: #1A3C6E;\n    letter-spacing: -0.5px;\n    display: block;\n}\n.cc-header .tagline {\n    font-family: \u0027DM Sans\u0027, sans-serif;\n    font-size: 0.75rem;\n    font-weight: 500;\n    color: #F4823A;\n    letter-spacing: 3px;\n    text-transform: uppercase;\n    display: block;\n    margin-top: 4px;\n}\n\n/* Burbuja usuario — texto invisible por tema oscuro */\n.message.user,\n.message.user *,\ndiv[data-testid=\"user\"] .prose,\ndiv[data-testid=\"user\"] .prose p {\n    background: #1A3C6E !important;\n    color: #FFFFFF !important;\n}\n\n/* Burbuja bot */\n.message.bot {\n    background: #FFFFFF !important;\n    color: #1a1a1a !important;\n    border: 1px solid #e8e2da !important;\n    border-radius: 16px 16px 16px 2px !important;\n    font-family: \u0027DM Sans\u0027, sans-serif !important;\n    font-size: 0.93rem !important;\n    line-height: 1.6 !important;\n}\n\n/* Área del chat */\n.chatbot {\n    background: #F7F5F2 !important;\n    border: 1px solid #e2ddd7 !important;\n    border-radius: 12px !important;\n}\n\n/* Botón enviar */\nbutton.primary {\n    background: #F4823A !important;\n    border: none !important;\n    color: white !important;\n    font-family: \u0027DM Sans\u0027, sans-serif !important;\n    font-weight: 500 !important;\n    border-radius: 8px !important;\n    letter-spacing: 0.3px !important;\n    transition: background 0.2s ease !important;\n}\nbutton.primary:hover {\n    background: #d9672a !important;\n}\n\n/* Ejemplos */\n.examples-table td {\n    background: #FFFFFF !important;\n    color: #1A3C6E !important;\n    border: 1px solid #e2ddd7 !important;\n    border-radius: 8px !important;\n    font-family: \u0027DM Sans\u0027, sans-serif !important;\n    font-size: 0.85rem !important;\n    font-weight: 400 !important;\n    transition: all 0.2s ease !important;\n}\n.examples-table td:hover {\n    background: #1A3C6E !important;\n    color: #fff !important;\n    border-color: #1A3C6E !important;\n}\n\n/* Input — texto invisible contra fondo oscuro */\ntextarea,\ntextarea:focus,\n.gradio-container textarea,\ninput[type=\"text\"] {\n    color: #1a1a1a !important;\n    background: #FFFFFF !important;\n    border: 1.5px solid #d6d0c8 !important;\n    border-radius: 8px !important;\n    caret-color: #1A3C6E !important;\n}\n/* Descripción */\n.prose p, .prose strong {\n    font-family: \u0027DM Sans\u0027, sans-serif !important;\n    color: #3a3530 !important;\n}\n\n/* Footer */\n.cc-footer {\n    text-align: center;\n    margin-top: 20px;\n    padding: 16px 0;\n    border-top: 1px solid #e2ddd7;\n    font-family: \u0027DM Sans\u0027, sans-serif;\n    font-size: 0.8rem;\n    color: #8a8078;\n}\n.cc-footer a {\n    color: #1A3C6E;\n    text-decoration: none;\n    font-weight: 500;\n}\n.cc-footer a:hover {\n    color: #F4823A;\n}\n.cc-footer .divider {\n    margin: 0 10px;\n    color: #d6d0c8;\n}\n","connect_heartbeat":true,"js":"","head":"","title":"Latino America Comparte – 			:root {
				--bg: linear-gradient(135deg, #f0f4f8 0%, #fdf6f0 100%);
				--col:   #1e293b;
				--bg-dark: #0a0f1e;
				--col-dark: #f1f5f9;
			}


			body {
				background: var(--bg);
				color: var(--col);
				font-family: Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif;
			}

			@media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) {
				body {
					background: var(--bg-dark);
					color: var(--col-dark);

virtual de Latinoamérica Comparte** — organización social con más de 10 años transformando vidas a través del emprendimiento, el liderazgo y el bienestar empresarial.\n\nMás de **1.200 personas**, **70 empresas** y **65 mentores** han sido parte de este proceso.\n\nConsulta sobre nuestras líneas **Comparte Academia** (programas DESKUBRE y ESTRUCTURA), **Comparte Liderazgo** y **Comparte Talento**, o escríbenos Hello!"}],"css":"\n@import url(\u0027https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Playfair+Display:wght@600\u0026family=DM+Sans:wght@300;400;500\u0026display=swap\u0027);\n\n.gradio-container {\n    background: #F7F5F2 !important;\n    font-family: \u0027DM Sans\u0027, sans-serif !important;\n\n    max-width: 100% !important;\n    padding: 0 !important;\n    margin: 0 !important;\n}\n\nbody {\n    background: #F7F5F2 !important;\n}\n\n/* Contenedor principal */\n.app.svelte-182fdeq {\n    padding: 0 !important;\n}\n\n/* Chat gigante */\n.chatbot {\n    height: 520px !important;\n    font-size: 1rem !important;\n}\n\n/* Área completa */\n.main {\n    max-width: 1400px !important;\n    margin: auto !important;\n    padding: 0 24px !important;\n}\n\n/* Input más bonito */\ntextarea {\n    min-height: 60px !important;\n    font-size: 1rem !important;\n}\n\n/* Botón */\nbutton.primary {\n    height: 60px !important;\n    font-size: 1rem !important;\n    padding: 0 24px !important;\n}\n\n/* Encabezado personalizado */\n.cc-header {\n    text-align: center;\n    padding: 28px 0 8px 0;\n    border-bottom: 1px solid #e2ddd7;\n    margin-bottom: 8px;\n}\n.cc-header .brand {\n    font-family: \u0027Playfair Display\u0027, serif;\n    font-size: 1.9rem;\n    color: #1A3C6E;\n    letter-spacing: -0.5px;\n    display: block;\n}\n.cc-header .tagline {\n    font-family: \u0027DM Sans\u0027, sans-serif;\n    font-size: 0.75rem;\n    font-weight: 500;\n    color: #F4823A;\n    letter-spacing: 3px;\n    text-transform: uppercase;\n    display: block;\n    margin-top: 4px;\n}\n\n/* Burbuja usuario — texto invisible por tema oscuro */\n.message.user,\n.message.user *,\ndiv[data-testid=\"user\"] .prose,\ndiv[data-testid=\"user\"] .prose p {\n    background: #1A3C6E !important;\n    color: #FFFFFF !important;\n}\n\n/* Burbuja bot */\n.message.bot {\n    background: #FFFFFF !important;\n    color: #1a1a1a !important;\n    border: 1px solid #e8e2da !important;\n    border-radius: 16px 16px 16px 2px !important;\n    font-family: \u0027DM Sans\u0027, sans-serif !important;\n    font-size: 0.93rem !important;\n    line-height: 1.6 !important;\n}\n\n/* Área del chat */\n.chatbot {\n    background: #F7F5F2 !important;\n    border: 1px solid #e2ddd7 !important;\n    border-radius: 12px !important;\n}\n\n/* Botón enviar */\nbutton.primary {\n    background: #F4823A !important;\n    border: none !important;\n    color: white !important;\n    font-family: \u0027DM Sans\u0027, sans-serif !important;\n    font-weight: 500 !important;\n    border-radius: 8px !important;\n    letter-spacing: 0.3px !important;\n    transition: background 0.2s ease !important;\n}\nbutton.primary:hover {\n    background: #d9672a !important;\n}\n\n/* Ejemplos */\n.examples-table td {\n    background: #FFFFFF !important;\n    color: #1A3C6E !important;\n    border: 1px solid #e2ddd7 !important;\n    border-radius: 8px !important;\n    font-family: \u0027DM Sans\u0027, sans-serif !important;\n    font-size: 0.85rem !important;\n    font-weight: 400 !important;\n    transition: all 0.2s ease !important;\n}\n.examples-table td:hover {\n    background: #1A3C6E !important;\n    color: #fff !important;\n    border-color: #1A3C6E !important;\n}\n\n/* Input — texto invisible contra fondo oscuro */\ntextarea,\ntextarea:focus,\n.gradio-container textarea,\ninput[type=\"text\"] {\n    color: #1a1a1a !important;\n    background: #FFFFFF !important;\n    border: 1.5px solid #d6d0c8 !important;\n    border-radius: 8px !important;\n    caret-color: #1A3C6E !important;\n}\n/* Descripción */\n.prose p, .prose strong {\n    font-family: \u0027DM Sans\u0027, sans-serif !important;\n    color: #3a3530 !important;\n}\n\n/* Footer */\n.cc-footer {\n    text-align: center;\n    margin-top: 20px;\n    padding: 16px 0;\n    border-top: 1px solid #e2ddd7;\n    font-family: \u0027DM Sans\u0027, sans-serif;\n    font-size: 0.8rem;\n    color: #8a8078;\n}\n.cc-footer a {\n    color: #1A3C6E;\n    text-decoration: none;\n    font-weight: 500;\n}\n.cc-footer a:hover {\n    color: #F4823A;\n}\n.cc-footer .divider {\n    margin: 0 10px;\n    color: #d6d0c8;\n}\n","connect_heartbeat":true,"js":"","head":"","title":"Latino America Comparte –           Evidence 
          <div class="mermaid">
      4. Tech Detected - Open Graph (1)
        1. GET https://8afe1d1ade262a052e.gradio.live/
          Alert tags
          Alert description

          The following "Miscellaneous" technology was identified: Open Graph.

          Described as:

          Open Graph is a protocol that is used to integrate any web page into the social graph.
          Request
          Request line and header section (262 bytes) 
          GET https://8afe1d1ade262a052e.gradio.live/ HTTP/1.1
host: 8afe1d1ade262a052e.gradio.live
user-agent: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/141.0.0.0 Safari/537.36
pragma: no-cache
cache-control: no-cache
          Request body (0 bytes)
          Response
          Status line and header section (160 bytes) 
          HTTP/1.1 200 OK
Date: Fri, 22 May 2026 22:11:32 GMT
Content-Type: text/html; charset=utf-8
Content-Length: 51088
Connection: keep-alive
Server: uvicorn
          Response body (51088 bytes) 
          <!doctype html>
<html
	lang="en"
	style="
		margin: 0;
		padding: 0;
		min-height: 100%;
		display: flex;
		flex-direction: column;
	"
>
	<head>
		<meta charset="utf-8" />
		<meta
			name="viewport"
			content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1, shrink-to-fit=no"
		/>
		<meta property="og:title" content="Gradio" />
		<meta property="og:type" content="website" />
		<meta property="og:url" content="{url}" />
		<meta property="og:description" content="Click to try out the app!" />
		<meta
			property="og:image"

		<style>
			:root {
				--bg: linear-gradient(135deg, #f0f4f8 0%, #fdf6f0 100%);
				--col:   #1e293b;
				--bg-dark: #0a0f1e;
				--col-dark: #f1f5f9;
			}


			body {
				background: var(--bg);
				color: var(--col);
				font-family: Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif;
			}

			@media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) {
				body {
					background: var(--bg-dark);
					color: var(--col-dark);
				}
			}
		</style>

virtual de Latinoamérica Comparte** — organización social con más de 10 años transformando vidas a través del emprendimiento, el liderazgo y el bienestar empresarial.\n\nMás de **1.200 personas**, **70 empresas** y **65 mentores** han sido parte de este proceso.\n\nConsulta sobre nuestras líneas **Comparte Academia** (programas DESKUBRE y ESTRUCTURA), **Comparte Liderazgo** y **Comparte Talento**, o escríbenos example"},"example_inputs":0},{"id":18,"type":"markdown","props":{"value":"\u003cdiv class=\"cc-footer\"\u003e\n  \u003ca href=\"https://latinoamericacomparte.com\" target=\"_blank\"\u003elatinoamericacomparte.com\u003c/a\u003e\n  \u003cspan class=\"divider\"\u003e·\u003c/span\u003e\n  \u003ca href=\"mailto:eduardodelcastillo@latinoamericacomparte.com\"\u003eeduardodelcastillo@latinoamericacomparte.com\u003c/a\u003e\n  \u003cspan class=\"divider\"\u003e·\u003c/span\u003e\n  \u003ca href=\"https://www.youtube.com/@latinoamericacomparte\" target=\"_blank\"\u003eYouTube\u003c/a\u003e\n  \u003cbr\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\n  \u003cspan\u003eEste chatbot responde únicamente con información Comparte.\u003c/span\u003e\n\u003c/div\u003e","show_label":false,"rtl":false,"latex_delimiters":[{"left":"$$","right":"$$","display":true}],"visible":true,"elem_classes":[],"preserved_by_key":["value"],"sanitize_html":true,"line_breaks":false,"header_links":false,"show_copy_button":false,"container":false,"padding":false,"name":"markdown","_selectable":false},"skip_api":false,"component_class_id":"543eb5f8dcfca947ba66ab196db059c79cdca82621b183bfcd8bbe4afebcd005","key":null,"api_info":{"type":"string"},"api_info_as_input":{"type":"string"},"api_info_as_output":{"type":"string"},"example_inputs":"# Hello!"}],"css":"\n@import url(\u0027https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Playfair+Display:wght@600\u0026family=DM+Sans:wght@300;400;500\u0026display=swap\u0027);\n\n.gradio-container {\n    background: #F7F5F2 !important;\n    font-family: \u0027DM Sans\u0027, sans-serif !important;\n\n    max-width: 100% !important;\n    padding: 0 !important;\n    margin: 0 !important;\n}\n\nbody {\n    background: #F7F5F2 !important;\n}\n\n/* Contenedor principal */\n.app.svelte-182fdeq {\n    padding: 0 !important;\n}\n\n/* Chat gigante */\n.chatbot {\n    height: 520px !important;\n    font-size: 1rem !important;\n}\n\n/* Área completa */\n.main {\n    max-width: 1400px !important;\n    margin: auto !important;\n    padding: 0 24px !important;\n}\n\n/* Input más bonito */\ntextarea {\n    min-height: 60px !important;\n    font-size: 1rem !important;\n}\n\n/* Botón */\nbutton.primary {\n    height: 60px !important;\n    font-size: 1rem !important;\n    padding: 0 24px !important;\n}\n\n/* Encabezado personalizado */\n.cc-header {\n    text-align: center;\n    padding: 28px 0 8px 0;\n    border-bottom: 1px solid #e2ddd7;\n    margin-bottom: 8px;\n}\n.cc-header .brand {\n    font-family: \u0027Playfair Display\u0027, serif;\n    font-size: 1.9rem;\n    color: #1A3C6E;\n    letter-spacing: -0.5px;\n    display: block;\n}\n.cc-header .tagline {\n    font-family: \u0027DM Sans\u0027, sans-serif;\n    font-size: 0.75rem;\n    font-weight: 500;\n    color: #F4823A;\n    letter-spacing: 3px;\n    text-transform: uppercase;\n    display: block;\n    margin-top: 4px;\n}\n\n/* Burbuja usuario — texto invisible por tema oscuro */\n.message.user,\n.message.user *,\ndiv[data-testid=\"user\"] .prose,\ndiv[data-testid=\"user\"] .prose p {\n    background: #1A3C6E !important;\n    color: #FFFFFF !important;\n}\n\n/* Burbuja bot */\n.message.bot {\n    background: #FFFFFF !important;\n    color: #1a1a1a !important;\n    border: 1px solid #e8e2da !important;\n    border-radius: 16px 16px 16px 2px !important;\n    font-family: \u0027DM Sans\u0027, sans-serif !important;\n    font-size: 0.93rem !important;\n    line-height: 1.6 !important;\n}\n\n/* Área del chat */\n.chatbot {\n    background: #F7F5F2 !important;\n    border: 1px solid #e2ddd7 !important;\n    border-radius: 12px !important;\n}\n\n/* Botón enviar */\nbutton.primary {\n    background: #F4823A !important;\n    border: none !important;\n    color: white !important;\n    font-family: \u0027DM Sans\u0027, sans-serif !important;\n    font-weight: 500 !important;\n    border-radius: 8px !important;\n    letter-spacing: 0.3px !important;\n    transition: background 0.2s ease !important;\n}\nbutton.primary:hover {\n    background: #d9672a !important;\n}\n\n/* Ejemplos */\n.examples-table td {\n    background: #FFFFFF !important;\n    color: #1A3C6E !important;\n    border: 1px solid #e2ddd7 !important;\n    border-radius: 8px !important;\n    font-family: \u0027DM Sans\u0027, sans-serif !important;\n    font-size: 0.85rem !important;\n    font-weight: 400 !important;\n    transition: all 0.2s ease !important;\n}\n.examples-table td:hover {\n    background: #1A3C6E !important;\n    color: #fff !important;\n    border-color: #1A3C6E !important;\n}\n\n/* Input — texto invisible contra fondo oscuro */\ntextarea,\ntextarea:focus,\n.gradio-container textarea,\ninput[type=\"text\"] {\n    color: #1a1a1a !important;\n    background: #FFFFFF !important;\n    border: 1.5px solid #d6d0c8 !important;\n    border-radius: 8px !important;\n    caret-color: #1A3C6E !important;\n}\n/* Descripción */\n.prose p, .prose strong {\n    font-family: \u0027DM Sans\u0027, sans-serif !important;\n    color: #3a3530 !important;\n}\n\n/* Footer */\n.cc-footer {\n    text-align: center;\n    margin-top: 20px;\n    padding: 16px 0;\n    border-top: 1px solid #e2ddd7;\n    font-family: \u0027DM Sans\u0027, sans-serif;\n    font-size: 0.8rem;\n    color: #8a8078;\n}\n.cc-footer a {\n    color: #1A3C6E;\n    text-decoration: none;\n    font-weight: 500;\n}\n.cc-footer a:hover {\n    color: **70 empresas** y **65 mentores** han sido parte de este proceso.\n\nConsulta sobre nuestras líneas **Comparte Academia** (programas DESKUBRE y ESTRUCTURA), **Comparte Liderazgo** y **Comparte Hello!"}],"css":"\n@import url(\u0027https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Playfair+Display:wght@600\u0026family=DM+Sans:wght@300;400;500\u0026display=swap\u0027);\n\n.gradio-container {\n    background: #F7F5F2 !important;\n    font-family: \u0027DM Sans\u0027, sans-serif !important;\n\n    max-width: 100% !important;\n    padding: 0 !important;\n    margin: 0 !important;\n}\n\nbody {\n    background: #F7F5F2 !important;\n}\n\n/* Contenedor principal */\n.app.svelte-182fdeq {\n    padding: 0 !important;\n}\n\n/* Chat gigante */\n.chatbot {\n    height: 520px !important;\n    font-size: 1rem !important;\n}\n\n/* Área completa */\n.main {\n    max-width: 1400px !important;\n    margin: auto !important;\n    padding: 0 24px !important;\n}\n\n/* Input más bonito */\ntextarea {\n    min-height: 60px !important;\n    font-size: 1rem !important;\n}\n\n/* Botón */\nbutton.primary {\n    height: 60px !important;\n    font-size: 1rem !important;\n    padding: 0 24px !important;\n}\n\n/* Encabezado personalizado */\n.cc-header {\n    text-align: center;\n    padding: 28px 0 8px 0;\n    border-bottom: 1px solid #e2ddd7;\n    margin-bottom: 8px;\n}\n.cc-header .brand {\n    font-family: \u0027Playfair Display\u0027, serif;\n    font-size: 1.9rem;\n    color: #1A3C6E;\n    letter-spacing: -0.5px;\n    display: block;\n}\n.cc-header .tagline {\n    font-family: \u0027DM Sans\u0027, sans-serif;\n    font-size: 0.75rem;\n    font-weight: 500;\n    color: #F4823A;\n    letter-spacing: 3px;\n    text-transform: uppercase;\n    display: block;\n    margin-top: 4px;\n}\n\n/* Burbuja usuario — texto invisible por tema oscuro */\n.message.user,\n.message.user *,\ndiv[data-testid=\"user\"] .prose,\ndiv[data-testid=\"user\"] .prose p {\n    background: #1A3C6E !important;\n    color: #FFFFFF !important;\n}\n\n/* Burbuja bot */\n.message.bot {\n    background: #FFFFFF !important;\n    color: #1a1a1a !important;\n    border: 1px solid #e8e2da !important;\n    border-radius: 16px 16px 16px 2px !important;\n    font-family: \u0027DM Sans\u0027, sans-serif !important;\n    font-size: 0.93rem !important;\n    line-height: 1.6 !important;\n}\n\n/* Área del chat */\n.chatbot {\n    background: #F7F5F2 !important;\n    border: 1px solid #e2ddd7 !important;\n    border-radius: 12px !important;\n}\n\n/* Botón enviar */\nbutton.primary {\n    background: #F4823A !important;\n    border: none !important;\n    color: white !important;\n    font-family: \u0027DM Sans\u0027, sans-serif !important;\n    font-weight: 500 !important;\n    border-radius: 8px !important;\n    letter-spacing: 0.3px !important;\n    transition: background 0.2s ease !important;\n}\nbutton.primary:hover {\n    background: #d9672a !important;\n}\n\n/* Ejemplos */\n.examples-table td {\n    background: #FFFFFF !important;\n    color: #1A3C6E !important;\n    border: 1px solid #e2ddd7 !important;\n    border-radius: 8px !important;\n    font-family: \u0027DM Sans\u0027, sans-serif !important;\n    font-size: 0.85rem !important;\n    font-weight: 400 !important;\n    transition: all 0.2s ease !important;\n}\n.examples-table td:hover {\n    background: #1A3C6E !important;\n    color: #fff !important;\n    border-color: #1A3C6E !important;\n}\n\n/* Input — texto invisible contra fondo oscuro */\ntextarea,\ntextarea:focus,\n.gradio-container textarea,\ninput[type=\"text\"] {\n    color: #1a1a1a !important;\n    background: #FFFFFF !important;\n    border: 1.5px solid #d6d0c8 !important;\n    border-radius: 8px !important;\n    caret-color: #1A3C6E !important;\n}\n/* Descripción */\n.prose p, .prose strong {\n    font-family: \u0027DM Sans\u0027, sans-serif !important;\n    color: #3a3530 !important;\n}\n\n/* Footer */\n.cc-footer {\n    text-align: center;\n    margin-top: 20px;\n    padding: 16px 0;\n    border-top: 1px solid #e2ddd7;\n    font-family: \u0027DM Sans\u0027, sans-serif;\n    font-size: 0.8rem;\n    color: #8a8078;\n}\n.cc-footer a {\n    color: #1A3C6E;\n    text-decoration: none;\n    font-weight: 500;\n}\n.cc-footer a:hover {\n    color: #F4823A;\n}\n.cc-footer .divider {\n    margin: 0 10px;\n    color: #d6d0c8;\n}\n","connect_heartbeat":true,"js":"","head":"","title":"Latino America Comparte – 				});
				document.body.style.padding = "0";
			}

			:root {
				--bg: linear-gradient(135deg, #f0f4f8 0%, #fdf6f0 100%);
				--col:   #1e293b;
				--bg-dark: #0a0f1e;
				--col-dark: #f1f5f9;
			}


			body {
				background: var(--bg);
				color: var(--col);
				font-family: Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif;
			}

			@media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) {
				body {

virtual de Latinoamérica Comparte** — organización social con más de 10 años transformando vidas a través del emprendimiento, el liderazgo y el bienestar empresarial.\n\nMás de **1.200 personas**, **70 empresas** y **65 mentores** han sido parte de este proceso.\n\nConsulta sobre nuestras líneas **Comparte Academia** (programas DESKUBRE y ESTRUCTURA), **Comparte Liderazgo** y **Comparte Hello!"}],"css":"\n@import url(\u0027https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Playfair+Display:wght@600\u0026family=DM+Sans:wght@300;400;500\u0026display=swap\u0027);\n\n.gradio-container {\n    background: #F7F5F2 !important;\n    font-family: \u0027DM Sans\u0027, sans-serif !important;\n\n    max-width: 100% !important;\n    padding: 0 !important;\n    margin: 0 !important;\n}\n\nbody {\n    background: #F7F5F2 !important;\n}\n\n/* Contenedor principal */\n.app.svelte-182fdeq {\n    padding: 0 !important;\n}\n\n/* Chat gigante */\n.chatbot {\n    height: 520px !important;\n    font-size: 1rem !important;\n}\n\n/* Área completa */\n.main {\n    max-width: 1400px !important;\n    margin: auto !important;\n    padding: 0 24px !important;\n}\n\n/* Input más bonito */\ntextarea {\n    min-height: 60px !important;\n    font-size: 1rem !important;\n}\n\n/* Botón */\nbutton.primary {\n    height: 60px !important;\n    font-size: 1rem !important;\n    padding: 0 24px !important;\n}\n\n/* Encabezado personalizado */\n.cc-header {\n    text-align: center;\n    padding: 28px 0 8px 0;\n    border-bottom: 1px solid #e2ddd7;\n    margin-bottom: 8px;\n}\n.cc-header .brand {\n    font-family: \u0027Playfair Display\u0027, serif;\n    font-size: 1.9rem;\n    color: #1A3C6E;\n    letter-spacing: -0.5px;\n    display: block;\n}\n.cc-header .tagline {\n    font-family: \u0027DM Sans\u0027, sans-serif;\n    font-size: 0.75rem;\n    font-weight: 500;\n    color: #F4823A;\n    letter-spacing: 3px;\n    text-transform: uppercase;\n    display: block;\n    margin-top: 4px;\n}\n\n/* Burbuja usuario — texto invisible por tema oscuro */\n.message.user,\n.message.user *,\ndiv[data-testid=\"user\"] .prose,\ndiv[data-testid=\"user\"] .prose p {\n    background: #1A3C6E !important;\n    color: #FFFFFF !important;\n}\n\n/* Burbuja bot */\n.message.bot {\n    background: #FFFFFF !important;\n    color: #1a1a1a !important;\n    border: 1px solid #e8e2da !important;\n    border-radius: 16px 16px 16px 2px !important;\n    font-family: \u0027DM Sans\u0027, sans-serif !important;\n    font-size: 0.93rem !important;\n    line-height: 1.6 !important;\n}\n\n/* Área del chat */\n.chatbot {\n    background: #F7F5F2 !important;\n    border: 1px solid #e2ddd7 !important;\n    border-radius: 12px !important;\n}\n\n/* Botón enviar */\nbutton.primary {\n    background: #F4823A !important;\n    border: none !important;\n    color: white !important;\n    font-family: \u0027DM Sans\u0027, sans-serif !important;\n    font-weight: 500 !important;\n    border-radius: 8px !important;\n    letter-spacing: 0.3px !important;\n    transition: background 0.2s ease !important;\n}\nbutton.primary:hover {\n    background: #d9672a !important;\n}\n\n/* Ejemplos */\n.examples-table td {\n    background: #FFFFFF !important;\n    color: #1A3C6E !important;\n    border: 1px solid #e2ddd7 !important;\n    border-radius: 8px !important;\n    font-family: \u0027DM Sans\u0027, sans-serif !important;\n    font-size: 0.85rem !important;\n    font-weight: 400 !important;\n    transition: all 0.2s ease !important;\n}\n.examples-table td:hover {\n    background: #1A3C6E !important;\n    color: #fff !important;\n    border-color: #1A3C6E !important;\n}\n\n/* Input — texto invisible contra fondo oscuro */\ntextarea,\ntextarea:focus,\n.gradio-container textarea,\ninput[type=\"text\"] {\n    color: #1a1a1a !important;\n    background: #FFFFFF !important;\n    border: 1.5px solid #d6d0c8 !important;\n    border-radius: 8px !important;\n    caret-color: #1A3C6E !important;\n}\n/* Descripción */\n.prose p, .prose strong {\n    font-family: \u0027DM Sans\u0027, sans-serif !important;\n    color: #3a3530 !important;\n}\n\n/* Footer */\n.cc-footer {\n    text-align: center;\n    margin-top: 20px;\n    padding: 16px 0;\n    border-top: 1px solid #e2ddd7;\n    font-family: \u0027DM Sans\u0027, sans-serif;\n    font-size: 0.8rem;\n    color: #8a8078;\n}\n.cc-footer a {\n    color: #1A3C6E;\n    text-decoration: none;\n    font-weight: 500;\n}\n.cc-footer a:hover {\n    color: #F4823A;\n}\n.cc-footer .divider {\n    margin: 0 10px;\n    color: #d6d0c8;\n}\n","connect_heartbeat":true,"js":"","head":"","title":"Latino America Comparte –           Solution

          Remove all comments that return information that may help an attacker and fix any underlying problems they refer to.
      2. Re-examine Cache-control Directives (1)
        1. GET https://8afe1d1ade262a052e.gradio.live/
          Alert tags
          • WSTG-v42-ATHN-06
          • CWE-525
          • POLICY_PENTEST =
          • SYSTEMIC
          Alert description

          The cache-control header has not been set properly or is missing, allowing the browser and proxies to cache content. For static assets like css, js, or image files this might be intended, however, the resources should be reviewed to ensure that no sensitive content will be cached.

virtual de Latinoamérica Comparte** — organización social con más de 10 años transformando vidas a través del emprendimiento, el liderazgo y el bienestar empresarial.\n\nMás de **1.200 personas**, **70 empresas** y **65 mentores** han sido parte de este proceso.\n\nConsulta sobre nuestras líneas **Comparte Academia** (programas DESKUBRE y ESTRUCTURA), **Comparte Liderazgo** y **Comparte  background: #F7F5F2 !important;\n}\n\n/* Contenedor principal */\n.app.svelte-182fdeq {\n    padding: 0 !important;\n}\n\n/* Chat gigante */\n.chatbot {\n    height: 520px !important;\n    font-size: 1rem !important;\n}\n\n/* Área completa */\n.main {\n    max-width: 1400px !important;\n    margin: auto !important;\n    padding: 0 24px !important;\n}\n\n/* Input más bonito */\ntextarea {\n    min-height: 60px !important;\n    font-size: 1rem !important;\n}\n\n/* Botón */\nbutton.primary {\n    height: 60px !important;\n    font-size: 1rem !important;\n    padding: 0 24px !important;\n}\n\n/* Encabezado personalizado */\n.cc-header {\n    text-align: center;\n    padding: 28px 0 8px 0;\n    border-bottom: 1px solid #e2ddd7;\n    margin-bottom: 8px;\n}\n.cc-header .brand {\n    font-family: \u0027Playfair Display\u0027, serif;\n    font-size: 1.9rem;\n    color: #1A3C6E;\n    letter-spacing: -0.5px;\n    display: block;\n}\n.cc-header .tagline {\n    font-family: \u0027DM Sans\u0027, sans-serif;\n    font-size: 0.75rem;\n    font-weight: 500;\n    color: #F4823A;\n    letter-spacing: 3px;\n    text-transform: uppercase;\n    display: block;\n    margin-top: 4px;\n}\n\n/* Burbuja usuario — texto invisible por tema oscuro */\n.message.user,\n.message.user *,\ndiv[data-testid=\"user\"] .prose,\ndiv[data-testid=\"user\"] .prose p {\n    background: #1A3C6E !important;\n    color: #FFFFFF !important;\n}\n\n/* Burbuja bot */\n.message.bot {\n    background: #FFFFFF !important;\n    color: #1a1a1a !important;\n    border: 1px solid #e8e2da !important;\n    border-radius: 16px 16px 16px 2px !important;\n    font-family: \u0027DM Sans\u0027, sans-serif !important;\n    font-size: 0.93rem !important;\n    line-height: 1.6 !important;\n}\n\n/* Área del chat */\n.chatbot {\n    background: #F7F5F2 !important;\n    border: 1px solid #e2ddd7 !important;\n    border-radius: 12px !important;\n}\n\n/* Botón enviar */\nbutton.primary {\n    background: #F4823A !important;\n    border: none !important;\n    color: white !important;\n    font-family: \u0027DM Sans\u0027, sans-serif !important;\n    font-weight: 500 !important;\n    border-radius: 8px !important;\n    letter-spacing: 0.3px !important;\n    transition: background 0.2s ease !important;\n}\nbutton.primary:hover {\n    background: #d9672a !important;\n}\n\n/* Ejemplos */\n.examples-table td {\n    background: #FFFFFF !important;\n    color: #1A3C6E !important;\n    border: 1px solid #e2ddd7 !important;\n    border-radius: 8px !important;\n    font-family: \u0027DM Sans\u0027, sans-serif !important;\n    font-size: 0.85rem !important;\n    font-weight: 400 !important;\n    transition: all 0.2s ease !important;\n}\n.examples-table td:hover {\n    background: #1A3C6E !important;\n    color: #fff !important;\n    border-color: #1A3C6E !important;\n}\n\n/* Input — texto invisible contra fondo oscuro */\ntextarea,\ntextarea:focus,\n.gradio-container textarea,\ninput[type=\"text\"] {\n    color: #1a1a1a !important;\n    background: #FFFFFF !important;\n    border: 1.5px solid #d6d0c8 !important;\n    border-radius: 8px !important;\n    caret-color: #1A3C6E !important;\n}\n/* Descripción */\n.prose p, .prose strong {\n    font-family: \u0027DM Sans\u0027, sans-serif !important;\n    color: #3a3530 !important;\n}\n\n/* Footer */\n.cc-footer {\n    text-align: center;\n    margin-top: 20px;\n    padding: 16px 0;\n    border-top: 1px solid #e2ddd7;\n    font-family: \u0027DM Sans\u0027, sans-serif;\n    font-size: 0.8rem;\n    color: #8a8078;\n}\n.cc-footer a {\n    color: #1A3C6E;\n    text-decoration: none;\n    font-weight: 500;\n}\n.cc-footer a:hover {\n    color: #F4823A;\n}\n.cc-footer .divider {\n    margin: 0 10px;\n    color: #d6d0c8;\n}\n","connect_heartbeat":true,"js":"","head":"","title":"Latino America Comparte – {"named_endpoints":{"/chat":{"parameters":[{"label":"parameter_3","parameter_name":"message","parameter_has_default":false,"parameter_default":null,"type":{"type":"string"},"python_type":{"type":"str","description":""},"component":"Textbox","example_input":"Hello!!"}],"returns":[{"label":"Response","type":{"type":{},"description":"any valid json"},"python_type":{"type":"str | float | bool | list | dict","description":"any valid json"},"component":"Json"}],"show_api":true,"description":"Wrapper para gr.ChatInterface. Recibe el mensaje del usuario, invoca el pipeline RAG completo y retorna la respuesta generada por el LLM."}},"unnamed_endpoints":{}};</script>

		<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com" />
		<link
			rel="preconnect"
			href="https://fonts.gstatic.com"
			crossorigin="anonymous"
		/>
		<script
			src="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/iframe-resizer/4.3.1/iframeResizer.contentWindow.min.js"
			async
		></script>
		<script data-gradio-mode>
			window.__gradio_mode__ = "app";
			window.iFrameResizer = {
				autoResize: false,
				sizeWidth: false
			};
			window.parent?.postMessage(
				{ type: "SET_SCROLLING", enabled: false },
				"*"
			);
		</script>
		<link rel="manifest" href="/manifest.json" />
		<script type="module" crossorigin src="./assets/index-DputZZxm.js"></script>
		<link rel="stylesheet" crossorigin href="./assets/index-CCA5X64I.css">
	</head>

	<body
		style="
			width: 100%;
			margin: 0;
			padding: 0;
			display: flex;
			flex-direction: column;
			flex-grow: 1;
		"
	>
		<gradio-app
			control_page_title="true"
			embed="false"
			eager="true"
			style="display: flex; flex-direction: column; flex-grow: 1"
		>
		</gradio-app>
		<script>
			const ce = document.getElementsByTagName("gradio-app");

			if (ce[0]) {
				ce[0].addEventListener("domchange", () => {
					document.body.style.padding = "0";
				});
				document.body.style.padding = "0";
			}
		</script>
	</body>
</html>
          Parameter 
          cache-control
          Solution

          For secure content, ensure the cache-control HTTP header is set with "no-cache, no-store, must-revalidate". If an asset should be cached consider setting the directives "public, max-age, immutable".

Appendix

Alert Types

This section contains additional information on the types of alerts in the report.

  1. Content Security Policy (CSP) Header Not Set

    Source raised by a passive scanner (Content Security Policy (CSP) Header Not Set)
    CWE ID 693
    WASC ID 15
    Reference
    1. https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTTP/Guides/CSP
    2. https://cheatsheetseries.owasp.org/cheatsheets/Content_Security_Policy_Cheat_Sheet.html
    3. https://www.w3.org/TR/CSP/
    4. https://w3c.github.io/webappsec-csp/
    5. https://web.dev/articles/csp
    6. https://caniuse.com/#feat=contentsecuritypolicy
    7. https://content-security-policy.com/

  2. Cross-Domain Misconfiguration

    Source raised by a passive scanner (Cross-Domain Misconfiguration)
    CWE ID 264
    WASC ID 14
    Reference
    1. https://vulncat.fortify.com/en/detail?category=HTML5&subcategory=Overly%20Permissive%20CORS%20Policy

  3. Missing Anti-clickjacking Header

    Source raised by a passive scanner (Anti-clickjacking Header)
    CWE ID 1021
    WASC ID 15
    Reference
    1. https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTTP/Reference/Headers/X-Frame-Options

  4. Sub Resource Integrity Attribute Missing

    Source raised by a passive scanner (Sub Resource Integrity Attribute Missing)
    CWE ID 345
    WASC ID 15
    Reference
    1. https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/Security/Subresource_Integrity

  5. Cross-Domain JavaScript Source File Inclusion

    Source raised by a passive scanner (Cross-Domain JavaScript Source File Inclusion)
    CWE ID 829
    WASC ID 15

  6. Strict-Transport-Security Header Not Set

    Source raised by a passive scanner (Strict-Transport-Security Header)
    CWE ID 319
    WASC ID 15
    Reference
    1. https://cheatsheetseries.owasp.org/cheatsheets/HTTP_Strict_Transport_Security_Cheat_Sheet.html
    2. https://owasp.org/www-community/Security_Headers
    3. https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/HTTP_Strict_Transport_Security
    4. https://caniuse.com/stricttransportsecurity
    5. https://datatracker.ietf.org/doc/html/rfc6797

  7. Timestamp Disclosure - Unix

    Source raised by a passive scanner (Timestamp Disclosure)
    CWE ID 497
    WASC ID 13
    Reference
    1. https://cwe.mitre.org/data/definitions/200.html

  8. X-Content-Type-Options Header Missing

    Source raised by a passive scanner (X-Content-Type-Options Header Missing)
    CWE ID 693
    WASC ID 15
    Reference
    1. https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/previous-versions/windows/internet-explorer/ie-developer/compatibility/gg622941(v=vs.85)
    2. https://owasp.org/www-community/Security_Headers

  9. Information Disclosure - Suspicious Comments

    Source raised by a passive scanner (Information Disclosure - Suspicious Comments)
    CWE ID 615
    WASC ID 13

  10. Modern Web Application

    Source raised by a passive scanner (Modern Web Application)

  11. Re-examine Cache-control Directives

    Source raised by a passive scanner (Re-examine Cache-control Directives)
    CWE ID 525
    WASC ID 13
    Reference
    1. https://cheatsheetseries.owasp.org/cheatsheets/Session_Management_Cheat_Sheet.html#web-content-caching
    2. https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTTP/Reference/Headers/Cache-Control
    3. https://grayduck.mn/2021/09/13/cache-control-recommendations/

  12. Retrieved from Cache

    Source raised by a passive scanner (Retrieved from Cache)
    CWE ID 525
    Reference
    1. https://datatracker.ietf.org/doc/html/rfc7234
    2. https://datatracker.ietf.org/doc/html/rfc7231
    3. https://www.rfc-editor.org/rfc/rfc9110.html

  13. Tech Detected - Cloudflare

    Source raised by other tools/functionalities in ZAP (for example, fuzzer, HTTPS Info add-on, custom scripts...) (plugin ID: 10004)
    WASC ID 13
    Reference
    1. https://www.cloudflare.com

  14. Tech Detected - Google Font API

    Source raised by other tools/functionalities in ZAP (for example, fuzzer, HTTPS Info add-on, custom scripts...) (plugin ID: 10004)
    WASC ID 13
    Reference
    1. https://fonts.google.com/

  15. Tech Detected - HSTS

    Source raised by other tools/functionalities in ZAP (for example, fuzzer, HTTPS Info add-on, custom scripts...) (plugin ID: 10004)
    WASC ID 13
    Reference
    1. https://www.rfc-editor.org/rfc/rfc6797#section-6.1

  16. Tech Detected - HTTP/3

    Source raised by other tools/functionalities in ZAP (for example, fuzzer, HTTPS Info add-on, custom scripts...) (plugin ID: 10004)
    WASC ID 13
    Reference
    1. https://httpwg.org/

  17. Tech Detected - Mermaid

    Source raised by other tools/functionalities in ZAP (for example, fuzzer, HTTPS Info add-on, custom scripts...) (plugin ID: 10004)
    WASC ID 13
    Reference
    1. https://mermaidjs.github.io/

  18. Tech Detected - Open Graph

    Source raised by other tools/functionalities in ZAP (for example, fuzzer, HTTPS Info add-on, custom scripts...) (plugin ID: 10004)
    WASC ID 13
    Reference
    1. https://ogp.me

  19. Tech Detected - PWA

    Source raised by other tools/functionalities in ZAP (for example, fuzzer, HTTPS Info add-on, custom scripts...) (plugin ID: 10004)
    WASC ID 13
    Reference
    1. https://web.dev/progressive-web-apps/

  20. Tech Detected - Tailwind CSS

    Source raised by other tools/functionalities in ZAP (for example, fuzzer, HTTPS Info add-on, custom scripts...) (plugin ID: 10004)
    WASC ID 13
    Reference
    1. https://tailwindcss.com/

  21. Tech Detected - Uvicorn

    Source raised by other tools/functionalities in ZAP (for example, fuzzer, HTTPS Info add-on, custom scripts...) (plugin ID: 10004)
    WASC ID 13
    Reference
    1. https://www.uvicorn.org

  22. Tech Detected - cdnjs

    Source raised by other tools/functionalities in ZAP (for example, fuzzer, HTTPS Info add-on, custom scripts...) (plugin ID: 10004)
    WASC ID 13
    Reference
    1. https://cdnjs.com
